query: We're seeking a 7-day travel plan for two persons, starting from Chattanooga and covering three different cities in Georgia. The travel dates are set between March 9th to March 15th, 2022. Our new budget is $6,900. We require accommodations that are neither shared nor subject to visitor restrictions and should be private rooms. For transportation, we'd rather avoid air travel.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Chattanooga to Augusta, duration: 3 hours 57 mins, distance: 423 km, cost: 21
plan.attraction: Augusta Riverwalk; Phinizy Swamp Nature Park; Augusta Canal National Heritage Area;
Morris Museum of Art; Lucy Craft Laney Museum; Meadow Garden;

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Augusta to Decatur, duration: 2 hours 19 mins, distance: 229 km, cost: 11
plan.attraction: Decatur Square; Glenlake Park; Woodlands Garden;
Clyde Shepherd Nature Preserve; Mason Mill Park; Waffle House Museum;

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Decatur to Atlanta, duration: 19 mins, distance: 13.0 km, cost: 0
plan.attraction: Atlanta Botanical Garden; World of Coca-Cola; Georgia Aquarium;
plan.accommodation: Spacious private room close St. Barnabas Hospital, Atlanta

plan.attraction: Piedmont Park; High Museum of Art; Centennial Olympic Park;
plan.accommodation: Spacious private room close St. Barnabas Hospital, Atlanta
